textos.texto: Café Central — open every day! We have coffee, tea, and fresh juice. Breakfast from 7 to 11: bread, eggs and fruit. Lunch from noon to 3: salad, chicken, rice and soup. Prices are cheap: a coffee is two dollars, a sandwich is five dollars. We are near the park, next to the bank. You can pay by card or in cash. Come and visit us!

preguntas.enunciado: El café está cerrado los domingos.

textos.texto: Hello! Do you want to visit the museum? Take the bus number five near the park and go straight. Turn right at the corner. The museum is next to the bank. It is not far. Today the weather is cold and it is raining, so take a coat. See you at three o'clock!
